title: lecanthus corniculatus var. yunnanensis
intro: Lecanthus corniculatus var. yunnanensis, also known as Yunnanensis Lecanthus, is a variant of the Lecanthus corniculatus plant, a species of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as a treatment for fever, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lecanthus corniculatus var. yunnanensis include relief from coughs and congestion, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. In traditional herbal medicine, Lecanthus corniculatus var. yunnanensis is often prepared as a tea or used in infusions, and can also be dried and used as a powder or added to soups and other culinary dishes.
